name: Vitals Publisher (Python 3.11)
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'python -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt'
postStartCommand:
mkdir -p /etc/mosquitto/conf.d /run/mosquitto && printf 'listener 1883
allow_anonymous true

listener 9001
protocol websockets
allow_anonymous true
' > /etc/mosquitto/conf.d/docker.conf && mosquitto -c /etc/mosquitto/conf.d/docker.conf -d
